description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional sofa upholstered in a textured blue fabric. The sofa features three seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions, all of which appear to be attached and uniformly sized. The chaise section extends out from one side, providing ample lounging space. The armrests are straight, low-profile, and padded, matching the overall boxy and contemporary silhouette of the piece. The base of the sofa is solid and fully upholstered, with no visible legs, giving it a grounded and monolithic appearance. The upholstery is a solid blue color with a subtle woven texture, contributing to a clean and minimalist aesthetic.
description: A modern L-shaped blue sectional sofa with attached seat and back cushions, straight padded armrests, and a solid upholstered base. The fabric is a solid blue with a subtle woven texture.
description_view_0: Side view showing the chaise extension and the straight, padded armrest.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the continuous backrest and the solid, fully upholstered base.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the armrest and the full length of the chaise section.
description_view_3: Front view showing the three seat and back cushions, the L-shaped configuration, and the chaise on the right.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three attached, uniformly sized seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions, arranged in an L-shaped sectional layout with a chaise extension.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, low-profile, padded armrests at both ends, matching the sofa's boxy silhouette and upholstered in the same blue fabric.
attribute_leg_design: No visible legs; the base is fully upholstered and extends to the floor, giving a monolithic, grounded appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, continuous backrest with three attached, uniform cushions and no visible tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid blue fabric with a subtle woven texture, no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
